title: Multi-channel sequences break through at touch 7-8 now
anchor: 41% of meeting-producing replies land on touch 7 or 8 across 18 active sequences this month.
connect: Prior quarter breakthrough step was touch 4-5.
body: 41% of meeting-producing replies land on touch 7 or 8 across 18 active sequences this month. Prior quarter breakthrough step was touch 4-5.
trace: Breakthrough touch shifted deeper in sequence cadence, indicating prospects need more touches to respond than in previous quarter.

title: Subject line test doubles reply rate in first 3 days
anchor: The 'what changed at company' variant launched April 21st produces 4.7% reply rate across 320 sends.
connect: Prior opener reply rate was 1.9%.
body: The 'what changed at company' variant launched April 21st produces 4.7% reply rate across 320 sends. Prior opener reply rate was 1.9%.
trace: Subject line A/B test showing immediate lift in open-to-reply conversion, with 6 replies converting to booked meetings.

title: Speed-to-lead window captures 17 of 18 inbound this week
anchor: Current week inbound demo requests reached within 5-minute window convert at 78%.
connect: Leads reached after 30 minutes convert at 26%.
body: Current week inbound demo requests reached within 5-minute window convert at 78%. Leads reached after 30 minutes convert at 26%.
trace: Speed-to-lead performance showing strong within-window execution and clear conversion penalty for delayed response.

title: Weekend inbound catch-up produces 7 Monday meetings
anchor: All 11 weekend demo requests reached by 9:15 AM Monday morning.
connect: Same-day meeting booking rate hit 64% on weekend inbound.
body: All 11 weekend demo requests reached by 9:15 AM Monday morning. Same-day meeting booking rate hit 64% on weekend inbound.
trace: Weekend coverage completeness showing consistent follow-up rhythm on off-hours leads.

title: Healthcare vertical converts demos at 81% versus 64% average
anchor: Healthcare vertical demo-to-held-meeting conversion runs 17 points above all-verticals rate over 4 weeks.
connect: Average deal size on meetings advanced to opportunity runs at 2x all-vertical average.
body: Healthcare vertical demo-to-held-meeting conversion runs 17 points above all-verticals rate over 4 weeks. Average deal size on meetings advanced to opportunity runs at 2x all-vertical average.
trace: Healthcare segment showing both higher conversion rates and higher deal values, indicating strong ICP fit.

title: AE-accepted rate climbs to 84% after segment criteria refresh
anchor: 26 of 31 meetings booked in April advanced past AE qualification.
connect: Prior month accepted rate was 71%.
body: 26 of 31 meetings booked in April advanced past AE qualification. Prior month accepted rate was 71%.
trace: AE handoff quality improvement following segment criteria refinement on April 12th.

title: Morning call window produces 11% connect rate

connect: Morning block produced the majority of discovery meeting bookings this week.
body: 8am to 9am time block connects at 11% versus 5% post-lunch. Morning block produced the majority of discovery meeting bookings this week.
trace: Time-of-day calling data showing morning window effectiveness for both connection and conversion.

title: Multi-channel delivers 2.3x meeting rate versus email-only
anchor: 240 active prospects in multi-channel sequences this month show conversion lift.
connect: Breakthrough typically happens at sequence step 7-8 in multi-channel cadences.
body: 240 active prospects in multi-channel sequences this month show conversion lift. Breakthrough typically happens at sequence step 7-8 in multi-channel cadences.
trace: Multi-channel sequencing performance versus email-only approach across current active prospect base.

title: 6sense high-intent accounts reply on first touch

body: 3 of 5 accounts crossing intent threshold this week replied immediately. All 3 replied accounts booked meetings within 48 hours.
trace: Intent platform signal validation showing immediate response rate on high-intent account outreach.
